summary: Field designation TORO — bull-horned abelisaur noted for extreme speed and head-butting display behavior. InGen asset linked to Camp Cretaceous recovery logs.
facts: Reduced forelimbs; locomotion powered almost entirely by hind legs.
Prominent supraorbital horns — used in intraspecies combat.
Minimal skin impressions suggest fine scales with possible osteoderms.
Toro specimen shows scarring consistent with prior containment breach.
fieldNotes: Open terrain specialist. Do not attempt pursuit on foot.
